title: /pay <handle> <amount> command
description: Parse /pay alice 0.01 (handle from contact book, amount in ZEC). Validate amount > 0, handle resolves to a known pub_id. Create a new PaymentSession as payer. Send PaymentAction::Request via the normal chat broadcast to that peer. Display 'Payment request sent to alice for 0.01 ZEC' in chat.
close_reason: Done: /pay implemented in commands.rs including parse_zec_to_zatoshi, handle resolution, session creation, PaymentAction::Request broadcast, and wallet-guard check.
